{'name': 'Country', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Directory/Country.cs', 'db_table': 'dbo.Countries', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['Id (int, PK)', 'Name (string)', "TwoLetterIsoCode (string, e.g. 'DK', 'SE', 'NO', 'FI', 'GB', 'DE')", "ThreeLetterIsoCode (string, e.g. 'DNK', 'SWE')", 'NumericIsoCode (short)'], 'note': 'Used as a reference table for country-to-language mapping, phone routing, and culture selection. Not directly exposed via API — accessed via CountryConstants static class. CountryId values 1–6 map 1:1 with LanguageId values 1–6 (DanishCountryId=1 = DanishLanguageId=1). Gap analysis flags Countries as a dead_table (no direct API reference), but it IS referenced indirectly via CountryConstants.'}

{'name': 'CountryConstants (static)', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Directory/CountryConstants.cs', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['DanishCountryId = 1, SwedishCountryId = 2, EnglishCountryId = 3, FinnishCountryId = 4, NorwegianCountryId = 5, GermanCountryId = 6', 'DanishLanguageId = 1, SwedishLanguageId = 2, EnglishLanguageId = 3, FinnishLanguageId = 4, NorwegianLanguageId = 5, GermanLanguageId = 6', 'Phone codes: DK=45, SE=46, NO=47, FI=358, GB=44, DE=49, NL=31', 'Phone length rules per country (DK/NO=8 digits, SE=9–15, FI=6–12, DE=7–12, GB=8–10)', 'Currency conversion rates: SEK/EUR, SEK/DKK, EUR/DKK, NOK/EUR, NOK/DKK, DKK/EUR'], 'methods': ["GetCultureString(countryId) → 'da-DK' | 'sv-SE' | 'en-GB' | 'fi-FI' | 'nb-NO'", 'GetComparer(countryId) → StringComparer for locale-aware string sorting', "GetCountryCode(countryId) → 'dk' | 'se' | 'gb' | 'fi' | 'no'", "GetISOLanguageCode(countryId) → 'da' | 'sv' | 'en' | 'fi' | 'no'", 'GetPhoneCode(countryId) → phone prefix int', 'GetLanguageName(countryId) → display name string'], 'note': 'CountryId and LanguageId are interchangeable in this system — same numeric value, same 6 entries. This is a known design quirk documented in identity_access domain.'}

{'name': 'Language', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Localization/Language.cs', 'db_table': 'dbo.Languages', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['Id (int, PK, IDENTITY)', 'Name (NVARCHAR(100), COLLATE Danish_Norwegian_CI_AI)', "LanguageCulture (NVARCHAR(20), e.g. 'da-DK', 'sv-SE', 'en-GB', 'fi-FI', 'nb-NO', 'de-DE')", "UniqueSeoCode (NVARCHAR(2), e.g. 'da', 'sv', 'en', 'fi', 'no')", 'DefaultCurrencyId (int, DEFAULT 0 — not actively used)', 'Published (bit, DEFAULT 0 — controls visibility)', 'DisplayOrder (int, DEFAULT 0 — controls sort order)'], 'note': '6 languages in production: Danish(1), Swedish(2), English(3), Finnish(4), Norwegian(5), German(6). {'name': 'LocaleStringResource', 'source': 'ServiceAlert.Core/Domain/Localization/LocaleStringResource.cs', 'db_table': 'dbo.LocaleStringResources', 'type': 'FACT', 'fields': ['Id (int, PK, IDENTITY)', 'LanguageId (int, FK → Languages.Id)', "ResourceName (NVARCHAR(200) — dot-separated key, e.g. 'shared.DateFormatShort', 'errorMessages.LoginUsernameOrPassword')", "ResourceValue (NVARCHAR(MAX) — translated string, or 'Missing Translation' sentinel)"], 'indexes': ['ix_LocaleStringResources_ResourceName_LanguageId (ResourceName ASC, LanguageId ASC) INCLUDE(ResourceValue) — read by resource name', 'ix_LocaleStringResources_LanguageId_ResourceName (LanguageId ASC, ResourceName ASC) UNIQUE INCLUDE(ResourceValue) — ensures uniqueness per language'], 'note': "Every ResourceName exists once per language. When a new resource is inserted, the service auto-creates rows for ALL languages, with 'Missing Translation' as placeholder for non-provided languages. Sentinel value 'Missing Translation' is queryable via GetIncomplete()."}
